creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

So can you tell us more about your system? dmesg, boot -v (during
startup) pciconf -vl etc? because the information you reported
here is eh useless if we are going to help you.

Cheers
remko

-- 
Kind regards,

     Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
     FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

     /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
